name: Golden Years Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: No school-bus or K-12 transportation footprint identified. Compton-area senior/ADHC-style transportation; name closely matches multiple senior-transport providers in CA. No M&A signal.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 3-employee, ~$220K-revenue senior/ADHC-style transport operator in Compton with no evidence of school-district or special-needs student contracts. Below Summit's tuck-in threshold; not a school-bus operator.

name: Zbest Limo
recent_news: PO Box-based El Segundo CA limo operator; no school-bus or student-transport activity identified. Name conflicts with a larger unrelated ZBest Worldwide Limousine in Baltimore/Glen Burnie MD.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-vehicle/limo livery operator with no school-bus contracts, no SPED routes, and no fleet. Outside Summit's scope (school-bus tuck-ins).

name: Alliance 1 Transportation
recent_news: Charlotte NC LLC; website (alliance1trans.com) and Facebook indicate general transportation/delivery-logistics contracts with corporate clients, not K-12 school-bus routes. No school-district contracts found.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 3-employee Charlotte LLC focused on delivery/logistics rather than school-bus operations. No CMS or NC charter-school routes evident; below tuck-in scale.

name: United Non-Emergency Med
recent_news: Founded 2015; provides ambulatory, wheelchair, and stretcher NEMT in Anchorage/Mat-Su/Palmer/Chugiak area. Licensed/insured; 24/7 operations. No school-bus or SPED student-route activity disclosed.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Pure NEMT operator (medical appointments) in Anchorage; no K-12 or special-needs student transport contracts evident. Outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis.

name: Mobility Solution LLC
recent_news: Goodlettsville TN-based small LLC; no school-bus or district contracts found. Distinct from larger unrelated 'Mobility Solution Solutions' (mobilityslts.com) wheelchair-van dealer in Nashville. Likely small NEMT operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 3-employee Goodlettsville TN micro-operator with no evidence of school-district contracts or SPED routes. Below tuck-in scale and likely NEMT-only.
